title: Armed Pillagers
description: Makes pillagers use TACZ weapons against you!
body:
This mod makes Pillagers spawn eith random TACZ gun that they will use against you (addons and packs also will work).
They intentionaly have stormtrooper like precizion, other way they would be too powerfull.

Pillager having weapon and weapon drop chances are controlled via game rules. 

[**Join our Discord!**](https://discord.gg/36a7czDYYW)
